direct_answer.question: Have we tracked any conversions connected to the event we did a few weeks ago?
direct_answer.summary: Event engagement is confirmed, but conversion attribution is not fully tracked yet. Source breakdown is still being investigated and some lead sources are marked as not digitally tracked.
